text: "Honestly, the thing I keep coming back to is letting the people I interview actually tell the story — I'm there to report, not to editorialize. I write longform features, so structure matters a lot to me: I want pieces that move between the human stuff and the bigger picture in a way that feels natural, not forced. And above all, it has to be accessible — I'm writing for a general audience, not policy wonks or industry insiders, so if you need a glossary to follow along, something's gone wrong."
